nasb.text: And all His acquaintances and the women who accompanied Him from Galilee were standing at a distance, seeing these things.

esv.text: And all his acquaintances and the women who had followed him from Galilee stood at a distance watching these things.

cnv.text: 與耶穌熟悉的人，和從加利利跟隨他來的婦女，都遠遠地站著，看這些事。

ccb.text: 耶稣熟识的人和从加利利跟着祂来的妇女们都站在远处观看。

csbs.text: 所有熟悉耶稣的人，包括那些从加利利一直跟着他来的妇女，都站在远处看这些事。
